acceptance_criteria.text: Operator refresh copy says card refresh, not only reviews.
proof: Refresh chat_response now describes read-only card refresh and all available card data.
gaps: Internal /reviews/refresh-* route names unchanged for compatibility.

acceptance_criteria.text: Operator UI exposes paid AI-router classification cost.
proof: Operator UI renders AI-разбор команды: -N кредит from result.ai_router.

acceptance_criteria.text: AI-router public payload does not expose raw model response.
proof: raw_response removed from service result; test asserts absence.

acceptance_criteria.text: Cheap gate prevents smalltalk from calling paid AI-router.
proof: Unit and endpoint tests cover smalltalk without AI call or charge.
tests/test_operator_chat_fallback_api.py covers rule-based, fallback, smalltalk, and manual guard paths.

acceptance_criteria.text: manual_review_add_and_reply fallback cannot create a review without explicit review text.
proof: Endpoint test verifies AI manual-review fallback blocks without explicit review marker.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: python3 -m py_compile src/api/operator_api.py src/services/operator_intent_ai_router.py src/services/operator_fresh_reviews.py src/services/operator_paid_actions.py

PYTHONPATH=src:. python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_operator_chat_fallback_api.py tests/test_operator_intent_ai_router.py tests/test_operator_fresh_reviews.py tests/test_operator_capabilities.py tests/test_operator_manual_review.py tests/test_operator_review_reply_bulk.py tests/test_operator_news_generation.py tests/test_operator_social_post_generation.py tests/test_operator_services_optimization.py
known_gaps: Telegram parity remains a separate task.
